task: Fix Gemini 400 Bad Request Payload (Tool Binding)
outcome: Success. Formatted PluginRegistry FunctionDeclarations exclusively as OpenAI-compliant JSON schemas wrapped in { type: 'function', function: {...} } objects.
patterns: Langchain natively rejects raw Google FunctionDeclaration objects directly inside bindTools, raising validation errors, unless padded internally to the abstracted tool standard format.

corrections.proposed_fix: Mapped MCP parameters to explicit type='function' elements natively injected into bindTools.
